---
title: "IDENTIFICACIÓN DE AUTOR**"
subtitle: "Investigaciones en gestión del riesgo de desastres para Colombia"
author: "UNGRD"
date: "2021"
title-block-banner: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1451187580459-43490279c0fa?q=80&w=2072"
---

# **IDENTIFICACIÓN DE AUTOR**


William Oswaldo Gaviria Gutiérrez	[https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4228-4665](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4228-4665)  
Viviana Ramírez Loaiza		[https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3203-2472](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3203-2472)  
Lina Andrea Zambrano Hernández	[https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8675-3203](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8675-3203)
